Package battleship.model

Class Cards

java.lang.Object
battleship.model.Cards
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Cards extends Object implements Serializable
The Cards class contains all data to represent the game elements of Battleship. For creating different elements (such as Missile, Ship, MayDay Cards and Missed Cards), it has been defined four constructors with different parameters. Here it has been setter/getter methods for Card objects defined. In addition to that it has been defined the linkCreatorF() method to create the String for images links for each 'Cards'.
See Also:

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Cards(String team)
    Creates a new Cards object of type 'missed'.
    Cards(String team, char mdType, String name)
    Creates a new Cards object of type 'mayday'
    Cards(String team, int defence, char shipType, String name)
    Creates a new Cards object of type 'ship'.
    Cards(String team, String color, int power, String name)
    Creates a new Cards object of type 'missile'

    Method
    Description

    Returns the COLOR of the missile.

    Returns the PATH of image of the card.

    Returns the TYPE of the MAYDAY card.

    Returns the POWER of the missile. 1 for whites, 1,2,4 for reds.

    Returns the TYPE of the Ship.
    String

    Returns the TEAM of the card.
    String

    Returns the TYPE of the card.
    boolean
    isOpened()
    Returns if the GameCard is OPENED.
    boolean
    isSank()
    Returns if the ship is sunk, when it has lost all its defence by attacked.
    boolean
    isStruck()
    Returns if the ship is struck from enemy.
    String
    linkCreatorF(String team, String name)
    Returns the PATH for the card image.
    void
    setDefence(int defence)
    Set the DEFENCE of ship, when it has been on this card played.
    void
    setOpened(boolean opened)
    Set the parameter of opened true or false, when it has been from enemy on this card played.
    void
    setSank(boolean sank)
    Set the ship SANK variable true, when it lost all its power.
    void
    setStruck(boolean struck)
    Set the variable of 'STRUCK' for ship, when it has been from enemy attacked.
    String
    toString()
    A textual representation about the cards and cards information (such as Power of Missile or Defence of Ship) for Example: -White Missile; [W1] -Red Missile with 2 power; [R2] -Shield; (S) -Repair; [+] -Missed; [X] -Destroyer with 2 Defence; [D2] -Cruiser with 2 Defence; [C2]

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Field Details

    • frontImage

      private final String frontImage
      Single Variables for Cards object. frontImage is path for the card images. Differently variables are used in constructors according the card type.

    • type

      private final String type
      Single Variables for Cards object. frontImage is path for the card images. Differently variables are used in constructors according the card type.

    • team

      private final String team
      Single Variables for Cards object. frontImage is path for the card images. Differently variables are used in constructors according the card type.

    • opened

      private boolean opened

    • struck

      private boolean struck

    • sank

      private boolean sank

    • defence

      private int defence

    • power

      private int power

      private char shipType

      private char mdType

    • color

      private String color

  • Constructor Details

    • Cards

      public Cards(String team)
      Creates a new Cards object of type 'missed'.
      Parameters:
      team - team of the card, shows to which side belong that card.

    • Cards

      public Cards(String team, int defence, char shipType, String name)
      Creates a new Cards object of type 'ship'.
      Parameters:
      team - team of the card, shows to which side belong that card.
      defence - the life of ship object.
      shipType - the type of ship. 's' for 'submarine', 'd' for 'destroyer', 'c' for 'cruiser', 'b' for 'battleship' and 'a' for 'aircraftcarrier'.
      name - name of card images to create path.

    • Cards

      public Cards(String team, String color, int power, String name)
      Creates a new Cards object of type 'missile'
      Parameters:
      team - team of the card, shows to which side belong that card.
      color - color of missile. 'red' or 'white'. Both are used in different way.
      power - power of the missile. Whites have 1, Reds have 1,2,4.
      name - name of card images to create path.

    • Cards

      public Cards(String team, char mdType, String name)
      Creates a new Cards object of type 'mayday'
      Parameters:
      team - team of the card, shows to which side belong that card.
      mdType - type of mayday card. 's' for 'shield' 'r' for 'repair'.
      name - name of card images to create path.

  • Method Details

    • getTeam

      public String getTeam()
      Returns the TEAM of the card.
      Returns:
      team of the card.

    • getFrontImage

      public String getFrontImage()
      Returns the PATH of image of the card.
      Returns:
      path of image of the card.

    • getType

      public String getType()
      Returns the TYPE of the card.
      Returns:
      type of the card.

    • setOpened

      public void setOpened(boolean opened)
      Set the parameter of opened true or false, when it has been from enemy on this card played.
      Parameters:
      opened - boolean value for card opened.

    • isOpened

      public boolean isOpened()
      Returns if the GameCard is OPENED. Can be enemy card or own card.
      Returns:
      true when it is opened, else false.

    • setDefence

      public void setDefence(int defence)
      Set the DEFENCE of ship, when it has been on this card played. When from enemy played defence is minus else plus.
      Parameters:
      defence - defence for ship.

    • getDefence

      public int getDefence()
      Returns the DEFENCE of the ship.
      Returns:
      defence of the ship.

    • getShipType

      public char getShipType()
      Returns the TYPE of the Ship. 's' for 'submarine', 'd' for 'destroyer', 'c' for 'cruiser', 'b' for 'battleship' and 'a' for 'aircraftcarrier'.
      Returns:
      the type of the ship.

    • setStruck

      public void setStruck(boolean struck)
      Set the variable of 'STRUCK' for ship, when it has been from enemy attacked.
      Parameters:
      struck - boolean value for ship 'struck'.

    • isStruck

      public boolean isStruck()
      Returns if the ship is struck from enemy.
      Returns:
      true of false.

    • isSank

      public boolean isSank()
      Returns if the ship is sunk, when it has lost all its defence by attacked.
      Returns:
      true of false.

    • setSank

      public void setSank(boolean sank)
      Set the ship SANK variable true, when it lost all its power.
      Parameters:
      sank - boolean value for sank.

    • getColor

      public String getColor()
      Returns the COLOR of the missile. White or Red.
      Returns:
      the color of missile.

    • getPower

      public int getPower()
      Returns the POWER of the missile. 1 for whites, 1,2,4 for reds.
      Returns:
      the power of missile.

    • getMDType

      public char getMDType()
      Returns the TYPE of the MAYDAY card. 's' for 'shield' 'r' for 'repair'.
      Returns:
      the type of the mayday.

    • linkCreatorF

      public String linkCreatorF(String team, String name)
      Returns the PATH for the card image. It is for GUI.
      Parameters:
      team - team of the card.
      name - name of the image of the card.
      Returns:
      the path for the card image.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      A textual representation about the cards and cards information (such as Power of Missile or Defence of Ship) for Example: -White Missile; [W1] -Red Missile with 2 power; [R2] -Shield; (S) -Repair; [+] -Missed; [X] -Destroyer with 2 Defence; [D2] -Cruiser with 2 Defence; [C2]
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      information of cards.
